decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id (corridor_first-second-avenues-brt) already matches an existing registry record with the same record_id. Per identity rules, when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new' — the observation already resolves to that canonical record. The registry record corridor_first-second-avenues-brt shares the same streets (First Avenue/Second Avenue), limits (South Ferry to 125th Street), borough (Manhattan), and even lists corridor_first-second-ave-sbs-2009 among its aliases.
